title: Section 5
content: Officers in the Territorial Army shall be of the two following classes, namely,-- (a) officers holding commissions in the Territorial Army granted by the President with designations of rank corresponding to those of Indian commissioned officers 1[of the Regular Army]; and (b) junior commissioned officers holding commissions in the Territorial Army granted by the President with designations of rank corresponding to those of 2[junior commissioned officers of the Regular Army.]
footnote: 1. Ins. by the A.O. 1950. 2. Subs., ibid., for "Viceroy's commissioned officers".
